commit_scope: Add a pure dynamic grammar carrier floor.

local_validation.notes: Focused validate returned `core.fk+dynamic-grammar-carrier.fk+dynamic-grammar-carrier-band.fk -> 4095` with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The fourth-arm gate returned `PASS-4WAY  dynamic-grammar-carrier`. Wellness reported no attention items.

ci_validation.notes: No push or PR yet for this lane.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested; this is a local Form runtime floor.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Dynamic grammar support now has a pure Form-native carrier receipt for rule extension data, selector registration, parse trace, and lower trace.

phase_gate.gate: Dynamic grammar work needs a pure Form-native carrier for rule extensions before host file/config plugin loading or parser-table generation can be claimed as first-class.
phase_gate.next: Connect runtime-grammar.fk host file/config plugin loading to dynamic-grammar-carrier receipts, then add parser-table generation and lowering-back-to-form proofs.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Runtime grammar registry and host config loading existed, but the dynamic grammar wall still lacked a small fourth-arm rule-extension carrier receipt.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: dynamic-grammar-carrier returns 4095 four-way and is admitted to form/fourth-arm-bands.txt.

lowering back to executable Form recipes
